creator: skv@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Rejected. 

::Keepalive does not have explicit dependency on ::SSLify - see: 
http://search.cpan.org/src/RCAPUTO/POE-Component-Client-Keepalive-0.1000/Makefile.PL 

It's obvious because SSL support must be optional. 

If your application requires SSLify - just install security/p5-POE-Component-SSLify separately.
